posts.text:
Former Director of the National Counterterrorism Center Joe Kent is under FBI investigation for allegedly leaking classified information.

The investigation had already began before Kent announced his resignation on Tuesday.

Video

Unidentified drones detected on Wednesday night above Washington Army base, Fort McNair, where Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Secretary of War Pete Hegseth live.

No word yet on who operated the drones or where they came from but a statement from White House officials is expected.

Drones have previously been sighted over Fort McNair recently leading to reported discussions about increasing security and even moving Rubio and Hegseth.

Gavin Newsom does NOT want you to see this…
